steps.action: Navigate to app with URL params (chainId=1, USDC->WETH, amount=1000)
steps.observed: Page loaded, quote submitted automatically via URL params

steps.action: Wait for quote results to load
steps.observed: Curve quote displayed showing 0.513272 WETH, countdown 'Refreshing in 15s' visible
Observer installed successfully
2 compare requests detected with ~18s interval (includes network latency). UI showed 'Refreshing quotes...' during fetch, then new results with different provider (kyberswap vs initial odos)

evidence.network: PerformanceObserver tracked 2 /compare requests with timestamps 18s apart

steps.observed: Refresh indicator div visible with 'Refreshing in 15s' text, progress bar with green gradient fill, and status area
Observed values: 15s, 12s, 9s, 7s, 6s, 5s, 2s, 0s - counter ticks down every second
Text changes to 'Refreshing quotes...' with progress bar at 100% during fetch

assertions.title: Refresh stops on Swap or Approve click

steps.action: Source inspection: check executeWalletTransaction in src/server.ts
steps.observed: Line 1686: pauseAutoRefreshForTransaction() called after setTxCardPending, before ensureWalletOnChain
Lines 1125-1132: Sets autoRefreshState.paused=true, calls clearAutoRefreshTimer(), updates indicator to 'Auto-refresh paused'
Line 1538: Returns early if autoRefreshState.paused is true
Line 1100: Timer callback checks autoRefreshState.paused and returns early if true

steps.action: Set amount field to '999999' while auto-refresh is counting down
steps.observed: Amount field set to 999999 via JS

steps.action: Screenshot before refresh with form showing 999999
steps.observed: Screenshot taken showing amount=999999

steps.expected: New results loaded, form values preserved
steps.observed: Auto-refresh completed successfully with new quote data

steps.expected: amount=999999, other fields unchanged, scrollY preserved
steps.observed: amount='999999', from/to/slippage/chainId all preserved, scrollY=616.5 maintained

evidence.network: Auto-refresh /compare request used original params (amount=1000) not form display value - correct behavior since auto-refresh uses lastParams

steps.action: Source inspection: check runAutoRefreshCycle error path
steps.expected: Previous results preserved, error indicator shown, countdown restarts
steps.observed: Lines 1566-1571: On comparison.ok===false, sets errorMessage='Refresh failed. Keeping previous quotes.' and calls startAutoRefreshCountdown({clearErrorMessage: false})

steps.expected: Does not clear existing results on error
steps.observed: Line 1547: auto-refresh calls requestAndRenderCompare with keepExistingResultsOnError:true, which skips showError() call on failure
Lines 1059-1063: If autoRefreshState.errorMessage is set, displays it in refreshStatus span with 'error' CSS class (red color #f87171)

steps.action: Source inspection: check executeWalletTransaction finally block
steps.observed: Line 1718: resumeAutoRefreshAfterTransaction() called in finally block, guaranteeing execution on success, failure, or rejection
Lines 1135-1142: Sets paused=false, inFlight=false, calls startAutoRefreshCountdown() to restart the 15s cycle

steps.action: Wait for countdown to tick down to ~2s
steps.observed: Observed countdown at 2s in the UI
Button changed to 'Comparing...', new fetch initiated

steps.action: Wait for results and check countdown
steps.observed: Countdown showed 'Refreshing in 12s' after results loaded (accounting for fetch latency), confirming reset from 15s not continuation from 2s

evidence.network: Manual Compare triggered new /compare request, countdown reset after response

steps.action: Navigate to fresh page at http://localhost:3001/
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully

steps.action: Install fetch interceptor to track /compare requests
steps.observed: Fetch interceptor installed via window.fetch wrapper
After 22 seconds, window.__compareRequests.length === 0, confirming no auto-refresh activity

steps.expected: Page showing form only, no results
steps.observed: Form displayed with default fields, no results section, no refresh indicator

evidence.network: 0 /compare requests in 22 seconds of idle page

frictions.description: agent-browser CLI tool (separate from Playwright MCP) loses page context after page updates - window globals set via eval disappear, page navigates to about:blank. Had to switch to Playwright MCP tools for reliable testing.
frictions.resolution: Used Playwright MCP tools (browser_evaluate, browser_wait_for, etc.) instead of agent-browser CLI for the main test flow. Used agent-browser CLI only for VAL-REFRESH-008 initial idle test.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. VAL-REFRESH-001/002/004/007/008 verified via live browser testing with Playwright. VAL-REFRESH-003/005/006 verified via source code inspection (manual-evidence assertions). Auto-refresh fires every ~15s, countdown indicator is visible and functional, form state is preserved during refresh, manual Compare resets the countdown, and no auto-refresh occurs before first user interaction.
